---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

## Package installation

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```

## Read .csv files
```{r}
subfolder_list <- list.dirs(path =Path_1, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

csv_list <- list.files(subfolder_list[1],pattern = "(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

df_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(csv_list)) 
{
  df<- readr::read_delim(csv_list[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE, show_col_types = FALSE)
  df$Cell<- n
  df$Time<-(0:(nrow(df)-1))*10
  df_list[[n]] <- df%>% as.data.frame()
 
}

df_1 <- df_list[[1]]

for (n in 2:length(df_list)) 
{
  df_1 <- rbind(df_1, df_list[[n]])
          
}

colnames(df_1)[4]<- "avgSize"

```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}

df_summary <- df_1_removed %>% group_by(Time) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Count)
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
  
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se), fill="lightgrey", alpha=1)+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   #geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  #geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
   scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 95), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 220), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
  theme_linedraw()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "MRLC_num.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}

df_summary <- df_1_removed %>% group_by(Time) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(avgSize)
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
  
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se), fill="lightgrey", alpha=1)+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   #geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  #geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
   scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0.2, 0.4),breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 220), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
  theme_linedraw()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "MRLC_size.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```
